## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's SEO services and pricing for potential future engagement with Zenlytic.](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zenlytic had a negative AI SEO experience in the past, causing hesitation, but now considering organic growth and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [GrowthX pricing starts at $9K/month for 50K words of editorial content; programmatic content starts at $12K](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Rich is exploring budget options, potentially 1-5 months out from engagement](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [GrowthX offers flexible content strategies beyond just keyword-targeted blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Topics

### Previous SEO Experience

  - [Zenlytic had a problematic AI SEO experiment before Rich joined](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [AI-generated content went viral for wrong reasons, causing CEO's hesitation](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Someone was fired due to the incident](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)

### Current SEO Situation

  - [Zenlytic now ready to explore organic growth and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Events and product-led growth are going well](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Rich identifies easy-to-target keywords as an opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

### GrowthX Pricing and Services

  - [Starting price: $9K/month for 50K words of editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Programmatic content starts at $12K/month (1,200 pages/year)](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Typical engagement: $9K-$15K/month](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [95% of accounts include editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Flexible word count increments (e.g., 25K word increases)](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

### Content Strategies

  - [Editorial content: longer-form, often blogs but not limited to them](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Programmatic content: template-based, highly repeatable, scalable](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [GrowthX can enhance existing marketing strategies (webinars, ABM, podcasts)](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Focus on creating a network experience on the website for ICP](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Zenlytic's Timeline and Priorities

  - [Rich exploring budget options, 1-5 months out from potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Upcoming big event: Snowflake conference](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Main goal: increase content capacity for distribution and link building](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rich to work on budgeting and determine optimal timing for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Consider GrowthX services in context of enhancing existing marketing functions](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Rich may reach out to Kyle for further discussions on scoping and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Potential follow-up after Snowflake conference to reassess timing](https://fathom.video/share/eoZYW-zuLM4UQfXpdia8XTU248Y7xz7s?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
